explanation: The code prompts the user to input two integers representing the number of rows and columns of a matrix. It dynamically allocates memory for this matrix and fills it with the row index values. Depending on certain conditions related to the dimensions (evenness and modulo conditions), it invokes functions to print a specific pattern of asterisks in rows or columns, illustrating how to create visual representations based on matrix dimensions.
subject: Session 3 Question 3
summary: This project creates a matrix and prints specific patterns based on user input dimensions.
